LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JEFFERY GROW'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT MUST FILE HIS RESPONSIVE PLEADING BY FEBRUARY 16, 2011 AND MUST REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF $150.00 BY 3/15/11. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

Off Calendar Mar-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT JEFFERY GROW'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD A BASIS TO EVICT MR. GROW, WHO IS NOT THE FORMER OWNER. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.
